title: Comply.org Expert Review
description: An expert assessment of a vendor's compliance posture against the six core principles.

expertRefCode.description: Opaque identifier assigned by the issuing platform. Must be traceable back to the platform but must NOT contain the expert's personal information.

issuingPlatform.description: Identifier of the platform or organisation that assigned and verified the expert. Used for traceability.

issuingPlatformUrl.description: URL where the expert's identity can be verified by the issuing platform. The platform is responsible for expert KYC.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the review was completed.

summaryReport.description: Free-text summary of findings. Platforms may truncate for public display.

status.description: 'pending' = not yet assessed, 'submitted' = evidence provided but not verified, 'verified' = independently confirmed by the expert.

notes.description: Optional reviewer notes supporting the assessment.
